---
title: "visualization"
author: "reid"
date: "February 9, 2017"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    highlight: tango
---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(leaflet)

m <- leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%  # Add default OpenStreetMap map tiles
  addMarkers(lng=174.768, lat=-36.852, popup="The birthplace of R")
m 


```
